page: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCASv5 server family. Powered by an AMD processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 16 dedicated virtual CPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The underlying virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning it relies entirely on external storage options, though it is designated as Premium Storage capable. Additionally, the instance does not feature any integrated graphics processing units and does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the DC16as_v5 is structured for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities, making it suitable for application servers, web serving, mid-sized databases, and enterprise development environments that require stable compute resources without the need for local high-speed NVMe storage or hardware acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCASv5 family, powered by dedicated AMD processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is compatible with Premium Storage for external disk requirements. Lacking complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is designed for secure, general-purpose enterprise workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation provides reliable performance for application hosting, web serving, and development environments that demand consistent compute resources without the overhead of specialized hardware accelerators.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v5 is a virtual machine with 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and Premium Storage support, running on Microsoft Hyper-V.
tagline: A balanced virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors and sixty-four gigabytes of memory for general-purpose enterprise workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
